abilities.description:
When the ace pilot makes a move by maneuvering a vehicle through an obstructed area, through a hazard, or out of harm's way, choose their approach and roll +integrity. If they @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.3782f1b3c8ca8b88]{Withstand Damage} as an outcome of this action, add +1.

* Reckless: Add +2 and Lose Momentum (-1).

* Focused: Take +1 momentum on a hit.

When the ace pilot makes a move by making preparations for an expedition or by studying a chart, add +2 and take +1 momentum on a hit. Then, they may reroll any dice for the first leg of the journey as they @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.3ff03b51f620ab26]{Undertake an Expedition}.

When the ace pilot makes a move to navigate in any environment, they may rely on their intuition. If they do, roll +their spirit and @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.93d2d69b7e2b85e1]{Lose Momentum} (-1). When the ace pilot must @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.ff32c523829d6481]{Endure Stress} while piloting, you may roll +integrity. If you do, take +1 momentum on a hit.
